message:
deps: update Cargo.lock for asupersync 0.2.5, ftui 0.2.1, and franken crates

Bump lockfile to reflect upstream dependency changes:

- asupersync 0.2.3 -> 0.2.5 (switches from bincode to bincode-next 2.1.0,
  which also pulls in bincode_derive-next 2.1.0, unty-next 0.1.0, and
  virtue-next)
- asupersync-macros 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-decision, franken-evidence, franken-kernel 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- ftui and all ftui-* sub-crates (core, backend, extras, i18n, layout,
  render, runtime, style, text, tty, widgets) 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1

No direct Cargo.toml changes in this repo; these are path/git dependency
version bumps propagated through the workspace resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
